# Aquila (ng-aquila) – Angular Component Library

> Aquila is the open-source version of Angular Brand Kit (formerly Angular NDBX), the Allianz Design System component library for Angular. It provides 60+ accessible, enterprise-grade Angular components with full theming support.

Docs: https://allianz.github.io/ng-aquila
Source: https://github.com/allianz/ng-aquila
Package: `@allianz/ng-aquila` (npm)

## URL Structure

Each entry under General, Components, and Third-party sections may have up to three subpages:
- {base-url}/overview – Main documentation with usage guidance
- {base-url}/api – API reference (inputs, outputs, properties, methods)
- {base-url}/examples – Code examples

For example: https://allianz.github.io/ng-aquila/documentation/accordion/overview

## Guides

- [Getting Started](https://allianz.github.io/ng-aquila/guides/getting-started): Installation, setup, and first steps
- [Releases and Updating](https://allianz.github.io/ng-aquila/guides/releases): Version history and migration guides
- [MCP Integration](https://allianz.github.io/ng-aquila/guides/mcp): Model Context Protocol support for AI-assisted development

## General

Each topic's documentation is at: https://allianz.github.io/ng-aquila/documentation/{topic-name}

- accessibility
- config
- error-handling
- layout
- patterns
- rtl
- theming
- typography
- utils
- web-components

## Components

Each component's documentation is at: https://allianz.github.io/ng-aquila/documentation/{component-name}

- accordion: Expandable panels for collapsible content sections
- action: Clickable action items for navigation or menus
- autocomplete: Input with typeahead suggestions
- avatar: User avatar display
- badge: Status badges and labels
- base: Base label and error message components
- breadcrumb: Navigation breadcrumb trail
- button: Buttons with variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, danger, cta)
- card: Content card containers
- checkbox: Checkbox form control
- circle-toggle: Circular toggle buttons for option selection
- code-input: Multi-digit code entry (e.g., OTP)
- comparison-table: Product/feature comparison tables
- context-menu: Right-click or trigger-based context menus
- copytext: Body text with consistent typography
- data-display: Key-value data display pairs
- datefield: Date input with datepicker
- divider: Horizontal divider line
- dropdown: Select dropdown for single or multi-selection
- dynamic-table: Configurable data tables
- eyebrow: Small text above headlines for additional context
- file-uploader: File upload with drag-and-drop
- footer: Page footer component
- formfield: Form field wrapper with label, hints, and error messages
- grid: 12-column responsive grid layout system
- header: Application header/navigation bar
- headline: Heading typography (h1-h6)
- icon: SVG icon system
- image: Responsive image component
- indicator: Status indicator dots
- info-icon: Icon button that reveals contextual information via a popover
- input: Text input directive (used inside formfield)
- licence-plate: Vehicle licence plate input
- link: Styled link component
- list: Styled ordered and unordered lists
- mask: Input mask for formatted text entry
- menu: Navigation menu component
- message: Inline message banners (info, success, warning, error)
- modal: Dialog/modal overlay
- natural-language-form: Sentence-style form layout
- notification-panel: Notification dropdown panel
- number-stepper: Numeric input with increment/decrement
- overlay: Programmatic overlay positioning service
- page-search: In-page search functionality
- pagination: Page navigation for paged content
- phone-input: International phone number input
- popover: Popover tooltip with rich content
- price: Formatted price display with locale-aware currency formatting
- progress-stepper: Multi-step wizard/progress indicator
- progressbar: Progress bar indicator
- radio-button: Radio button form control
- radio-toggle: Toggle-style radio button group
- rating: Star rating input
- selection: Purely presentational selection indicators (checkbox and radio) for use in custom UI
- sidebar: Collapsible sidebar navigation
- sidepanel: Slide-in side panel
- signal-button: Button with integrated status signal
- slider: Range slider input
- small-stage: Hero/stage banner area
- spinner: Loading spinner
- switcher: Toggle switch control
- table: Data table with sorting and filtering
- tabs: Tabbed content navigation
- taglist: Tag/chip list with add/remove
- text: Inline text styling utilities including attention colors
- tile: Selectable tile with icon, label, and hint
- timefield: Time input field
- toolbar: Action toolbar
- tooltip: Simple text tooltip on hover
- tree: Hierarchical tree view
- video: Video player component
- virtual-scroll: Efficient rendering of large lists by virtualizing viewport items

## Third-party

Each integration's documentation is at: https://allianz.github.io/ng-aquila/documentation/{integration-name}

- ag-grid: Allianz-themed AG Grid integration

## Others

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/allianz/ng-aquila): Source code
